app.title: beeromat
app.tagline: After the match. After the pint. Without the chaos.

common.error: That didn't work — give it another go.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.welcomeTagline: Beer, banter, and bets for beers.

magicLink.invalidBody: It's expired or already been used. Ask your club admin to send a fresh one.

setup.title: Set a PIN for this phone
setup.subtitle: A quick 4-digit PIN so you're straight in next time.
setup.invalidFormat: The PIN needs to be exactly 4 digits

unlock.title: Your PIN
unlock.lockedBody: Five wrong tries. Sign in again with the link from your email.
unlock.forgotPin: Forgot your PIN? Email me a link
unlock.forgotPinSent: Link sent — check your email to set a new PIN.

invitation.welcomeBody: Pick a name your mates know you by, and we'll email you a sign-in link.
invitation.acceptedBody: We've sent a sign-in link to {email}. Open it on this phone to finish up.
invitation.errorInvalid: This invite's no longer good. Ask your club admin for a fresh one.
invitation.errorGeneric: That didn't work — give it another go.

magicLink.subject: Your beeromat sign-in link
magicLink.heading: Sign in to beeromat
magicLink.bodyParagraph: Tap the button to sign in. The link is valid for 5 minutes.
magicLink.fallbackLinkLabel: Or paste this link into your browser:
magicLink.signoffParagraph: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.

invitation.subject: {inviterName} invited you to {clubName}
invitation.heading: Welcome to {clubName}
invitation.bodyIntro: Hey! {inviterName} invited you to {clubName} on beeromat — the app the club uses to keep tabs on after-match beers.
invitation.bodyPitch: Tap the button to set up your profile and join in.
invitation.fallbackLinkLabel: Or paste this link into your browser:
invitation.ignoreNote: If you don't recognise {inviterName}, you can safely ignore this email.

payments.title: Payment history
payments.empty: No payments yet — once you settle up, they'll show here.

log.title: Log a beer
log.empty: No beers in the fridge yet — ask whoever runs the stock to add some.

tab.title: My tab
tab.empty: Nothing yet — go log your first beer.

settle.title: Settle up
settle.awaitingBody: You've flagged {amount} as paid — the treasurer will give it a nod soon.
settle.notSetUpBody: Your club admin hasn't added the bank details — give them a nudge.
settle.scanHint: Scan it with your banking app, then tap below once it's sent.
settle.markedPaid: Nice — the treasurer will confirm it shortly.
settle.claimPending: You've already got a payment waiting to be confirmed.
settle.recordFailed: That didn't work — give it another go.
settle.recorded: Got it — the treasurer will confirm it shortly.
settle.noteRequired: Add a quick note (like "cash to the treasurer").

treasurer.nothingPending: Nothing waiting — you're all caught up.
treasurer.disputeBody: Let {name} know their {amount} didn't add up — they'll see why.
treasurer.disputeReasonPlaceholder: e.g. nothing matching on the statement
treasurer.disputeFailed: That didn't work — give it another go.
treasurer.undoBody: Take back {name}'s confirmed {amount} — it lands back on their tab.
treasurer.undoFailed: That didn't work — give it another go.

bet.title: Settle a bet
bet.subtitle: Lost a bet? Take a mate's drink onto your tab.
bet.noSessionBody: Bets settle within a round — and a round kicks off when someone logs the first beer.
bet.logToStart: Log a beer to kick things off
bet.noOtherDrinks: Nobody else has logged a drink this round.
bet.tally: From bets this round: {count, plural, one {# drink} other {# drinks}} · {amount}
bet.outOfScope: That drink's from an old round.
bet.selfTransfer: You can only take someone else's drink.
bet.transferFailed: That didn't work — give it another go.
bet.voidForbidden: Only whoever made the swap (or a treasurer) can undo it.
bet.undoFailed: That didn't work — give it another go.

history.title: History
history.noSessions: Nothing yet — your rounds will show up here.

admin.alreadyInvited: There's already an open invite for that email.
admin.inviteFailed: Couldn't send the invite — give it another go.
admin.bankingSubtitle: Used to make the payment QR codes for members.
admin.ibanHint: Needed for QR payments. Clear it and members can't pay themselves in.
admin.invalidIban: That IBAN doesn't look right — double-check it.
admin.bankingFailed: Couldn't save — check the fields and try again.
admin.noBeerTypes: No beers yet — add the first one.
admin.duplicateName: There's already a beer with that name.
admin.beerTypeFieldsError: Check the fields and try again.
admin.restockFailed: That didn't work — give it another go.
admin.wouldGoNegative: That'd take the fridge below zero.
admin.adjustmentFailed: That didn't work — give it another go.
admin.invalidQuantity: Pop in a whole number above zero.
admin.invalidDelta: Pop in a whole number (minus to take away).

errors.unauthorized: You'll need to sign in for that.

forms.mustBePositive: Needs to be more than zero.
forms.amountHint: A comma or a dot works — like 120,50
